WeaponModifications.description: Weapon modifications from Five Parsecs From Home Core Rules (p.53). Gun Mods are permanent (cannot be removed). Gun Sights can be moved between weapons during campaign turns.

gun_mods.description: Items from this list must be fitted to a weapon, and cannot be removed or reversed. A weapon can have only one mod.

types.name: Assault Blade
types.description: The weapon gains the Melee trait. Damage +1, and wins combat on a Draw. Non-Pistol only.

types.name: Beam Light
types.description: When using the weapon in conditions of reduced visibility, increase visibility by +3".

types.name: Bipod
types.description: The weapon receives +1 to Hit at ranges over 8" when Aiming or when firing from Cover. Non-Pistol only.

types.name: Hot Shot Pack
types.description: If fitted to a Blast Pistol, Blast Rifle, Hand Laser, or Infantry Laser, +1 Damage. Any natural 6 on the shooting dice causes an overheat, rendering the weapon inoperable for the rest of the fight.

types.name: Cyber-configurable Nano-sludge
types.description: The weapon receives a permanent +1 Hit bonus.

types.name: Shock Attachment
types.description: The weapon receives the Stun trait against targets within 8".

gun_sights.description: Items from this list must be fitted to a weapon. Sights can be fitted to a weapon or moved to a new one when equipment is being assigned during the campaign turn. During battle, Sights cannot be attached or removed. If the weapon is damaged, any Sight attached also becomes damaged. A weapon can have only one Sight at a time.

types.name: Laser Sight
types.description: The weapon receives the Snap Shot trait. Pistol only.

types.name: Quality Sight
types.description: +2" Range increase. Reroll 1s when firing only 1 shot.

types.name: Seeker Sight
types.description: The weapon receives +1 to Hit if the shooter did not Move this round.

types.name: Tracker Sight
types.description: +1 to Hit if you fired at the same target during your previous round.
